info.name: 23. Use Case - Registrasi Uronefrologi
info.description:
For **complete repository for all SATUSEHAT use-cases** please access our public workspaces : [Postman Workspaces](https://s.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT) For **detailed SATUSEHAT use-cases import link** please see : [Postman Public Kemkes Link](https://link.kemkes.go.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT) Any information about SATUSEHAT FHIR Profile could be accessed through [Simplifier FHIR Profile](https://simplifier.net/guide/SATUSEHAT-FHIR-R4-Implementation-Guide/Home/FHIRProfiles?version=current) | Tanggal | Riwayat Perubahan | **Penanggung Jawab** | | --- | --- | --- | | 26 Jul 2024 | Versi Pertama - API sesuai dengan Playbook Registrasi Uronefrologi V1.4 | Thomas Adhi Nugroho Chaidir

Raden Nurilma Hidayatullah

Anisatul Afifah | | 06 Sep 2024 | Versi Kedua - API sesuai dengan Playbook Registrasi Uronefrologi V1.5 | Thomas Adhi Nugroho Chaidir

Raden Nurilma Hidayatullah

Anisatul Afifah | | 28 Oct 2024 | Versi Ketiga - Penambahan API Kajian Resep | Raden Nurilma Hidayatullah |
